---
title: "Module 1: Fungal Sampling"
subtitle: "BSC 495 — The Hidden World's Code"
author: "Carlos C. Goller"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    slide-number: true
    logo: BSC495logo-transparent.png
    footer: "BSC 495 | Module 1: Fungal Sampling | CC BY Carlos C. Goller"
    chalkboard: false
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    incremental: false
    scrollable: true
    css: module-slides.css
---

{{< include module1.qmd >}}

---

## Continue in Workbook {.center}

[Back to Module 1 Workbook](module1.html){.back-to-module}
